daily.today_energy: Mercury's dancing through your sector of curiosity, Sag. You're radiating that magnetic energy that makes people want to be around you. Lean into conversations and new connections—your vibe is *immaculate* today.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled or flying solo, there's a sweetness in the air around you. If you've been thinking about someone, the universe is giving you a gentle nudge to reach out. No pressure, just good timing.
daily.career: Your creative ideas are hitting different right now. This is the energy to pitch that project, share your vision, or take on something you've been hesitant about. Trust your instincts—they're sharp.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and lightness. A walk, some stretching, or anything that feels freeing will shift your whole mood. Pay attention to what actually energizes you versus what you think *should*.

weekly.overview: Mercury's moving through your sector of communication this week, so expect some meaningful convos to shift your perspective. The vibe is introspective but hopeful—trust your instincts when they whisper that something needs to change.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, there's an invitation to be more vulnerable than usual. Someone's paying attention to the real you, not the performance. Let them in a little. Authenticity hits different rn.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is peaked right now—this is the moment to pitch that idea or take on a project that actually excites you. Don't play small. Your confidence is magnetic, and people can feel it.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more movement and less overthinking. A walk, some stretching, or even dancing in your room counts. Notice where you hold tension and give yourself permission to release it. You deserve that ease.
